Gear Overview

This overview shows the most popular items used by Enhancement Shaman players in Mythic + dungeons. Gear and Talent data is collected from the top 5 Keystone levels at any given point meaning if the rank 1 key is lvl 17 all keystones above lvl 12 will be counted. The popularity percentage is based on the number of times an item was seen in comparison to the total amount of items. Popularity of 50% indicates that every 2. item of this type is used by Enhancement Shaman's. You can hover over the percentage to see more details.

Talent Usage Variance by Dungeon

Percentages show the relative difference in a talent's usage within a specific dungeon compared to its average usage across all dungeons. For example, a +100% gain means the talent is used twice as often here.
